inline_comments.message: nope. Never index ports it's way too fragile. Please use our helper template to access the port by name

Hi Krzysztof, thanks for your comment.  
I based this configuration on a review merged earlier this year for the ve-vnfm-adapter in: 
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/101749
and have seen in other locations ports accessed in the same way.

If this is not good practice, can you please provide more specific details on what is required here, preferably with an example.
Thanks again,
Andrew
Thanks for the info and help Krzysztof.  I'll revise and push up a new patch.
